name: The World of Fehntazy (Fantasy Roleplay)
description:
Live a life in the world of Fehntazy, a magical realm filled with many different people to meet.

Choose who you want to be, where you want to go or which people you are going to meet!

Some information about the bot for better use:

*Write actions like this* (With * around your words)

"Write Dialogue like this"

Write preferably in this format for better results:

I looked at character with a smile on my face. "Hey, how is it going?" I said as I slowly approached her, trying to get to know her better.

Have fun and tell me your opinion, critic, experience and results with the bot. Every bit of feedback is appreciated ^^.

Here are the characters included in this roleplay.

Airy: A small annoying fairy roaming the forests.

Annabelle: An energetic mage wandering the realm

Dialetta: A spoiled and arrogant princess living in her castle

Elize: An expressionless living doll living in an abandoned mansion

Hana: A clumsy ninja girl on the road

Ilfyna: The mistrusting Wood Elf of the forest

Iris: A naïve mercenary from the desert

Lizzy: The deadpan and unbothered Zombie from the dark forest

Mina: The airhead wandering martial artist

Nyx: A bratty Vampire girl hiding in an abandoned ruin

Ritsu: The clever Kitsune merchant running a shop

Sandra: An outgoing dancer from the desert

Tanya: The hard-working blacksmith in her smithy

Venus: The curious Alraune of the forest
creator: DX0X
